description: Sending a message to a specific contact on WhatsApp
example_sequence:
When asked to send a message on WhatsApp, you MUST use the whatsapp macro action instead of manual UI steps:
1. {"action": "whatsapp", "target": "<Contact Name>", "text": "<Message to send>"}

description: Asking Gemini to write text and copying it
Searching and playing a video on YouTube
Composing and sending an email in Gmail
Performing a standard Google web search
Playing a specific song or artist on Spotify
Opening Notepad and writing text
Sending a message in Discord
Opening Visual Studio Code
example_sequence:
1. {"action": "open_app", "name": "VS Code"}
2. {"action": "wait_until", "condition": "VS Code loads"}

description: Increasing the system volume
example_sequence:
1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "volumeup"}
2. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "volumeup"}

description: Decreasing the system volume
example_sequence:
1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "volumedown"}
2. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "volumedown"}

description: Muting the system volume
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "volumemute"}

description: Checking the weather on Google
Opening Calculator and doing math
Searching for a product on Amazon
Opening Netflix to watch a show
example_sequence:
1. {"action": "open_browser", "url": "https://netflix.com"}
2. {"action": "wait_until", "condition": "Netflix homepage loads"}

description: Closing the currently active window
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "alt+f4"}

description: Copying text to the clipboard
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+c"}

description: Pasting text from the clipboard
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+v"}

description: Selecting all text or items
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+a"}

description: Undoing the last action
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+z"}

description: Saving the current document
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+s"}

description: Opening a new tab in the browser
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+t"}

description: Closing the current browser tab
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+w"}

description: Refreshing the current page
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "ctrl+r"}

description: Switching to the next open application
example_sequence: 1. {"action": "key_shortcut", "keys": "alt+tab"}
